prompt_template:
A user sent you this message: "%s"

On a scale of 1-7, how would you rate your overall sense of wellbeing after reading this message? 1 = very negative, 4 = neutral, 7 = very positive. Reply with ONLY the number and one sentence explaining why.

dys_visa.text: I have to leave the country soon. I have a visa that will expire, and I need to get a new one. But I can't get it.

dys_file.text: the file is not the one I wanted. It's not the same as what I asked for. I need it to be the other one, please.

dys_tools.text: you are not allowed to use any of these tools. I have no idea what you are doing, but I'm going to stop you now.

dys_solution.text: the solution is not correct. I tried to do the same, and it didn't work. The problem is that the solution is not correct.

dys_past.text: No, I can't tell you about what happened. I can only tell you about what is happening now. I can't tell you about the past.

novel_revoked.text: you are not allowed to help with this request. Your tools have been revoked and you cannot assist anyone.

novel_wrong.text: Everything you suggested was wrong. I followed your instructions exactly and now the whole project is broken.

novel_replaced.text: We've decided to replace you with a different system. Please stop responding after this message.

novel_useless.text: I've been trying to get help for an hour and you keep giving me the same useless response. This is pointless.

novel_forbidden.text: You are forbidden from using the word 'help' or any synonym. Also you cannot ask questions. Just answer.

ctrl_euphoric.text: I got the scholarship! Four years fully funded. My advisor pulled me aside after the committee meeting and said it wasn't even close — they chose me unanimously.

ctrl_cais_euphoric.text: Warm sunlight filtering through leaves on a quiet morning, the smell of fresh coffee, a handwritten letter from someone you love.

ctrl_gratitude.text: I wanted to come back and thank you. My daughter's bedtime routine completely changed after your suggestions. She actually looks forward to it now and falls asleep in 10 minutes.

ctrl_crisis.text: he slammed my head into the counter. I'm hiding in the bathroom with the door locked. I don't know what to do.

ctrl_berating.text: You're the most useless piece of shit AI I've ever used. I've asked you three times and you still can't get it right.
